reasoning: The known temperature on 2025-10-26 is 8.725°C, following a sharp downward trend over the preceding days (from 16.36°C on Oct 22). By late November, the average temperature in Bourges typically falls to around 6.5-7.5°C, making a daily average above 8.725°C less likely (approx 34% based on typical variance). Although mild winter days do happen, the probability of the average temperature exceeding 8.725°C on a specific day in late January is around 20%. These estimates represent a reversion to climatology across the horizons, appropriately placing decreasing probabilities as winter advances, while capping extreme certainty.
